description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, including several large trees and manicured hedges. The structure features a flat roof with multiple skylights and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that allow for ample natural light. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored stone and smooth white plaster, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. A driveway leads to a garage on one side, while a swimming pool is visible in the backyard, bordered by greenery for privacy. The front entrance is accentuated by a minimalist pathway and flanked by small shrubs. The overall layout is open and spacious, with outdoor living areas integrated into the design.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of stone and white plaster exterior, surrounded by trees and featuring a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the elongated structure of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large windows, and the swimming pool area bordered by dense trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, additional trees, and the side facade with more windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and grouped side windows
